description: Add task status tracking, editing, badges, and filtering.

userStories.title: Add task status persistence with pending default
userStories.description: As a product team member, I want each task to persist a status value so that workflow progress is tracked reliably.
acceptanceCriteria: Tasks storage includes a status field with allowed values pending, in_progress, and done
Existing tasks are backfilled or default to pending
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Define shared task status model contract
userStories.description: As an engineer, I want one shared task-status type so that API handlers and UI components use consistent status values.
acceptanceCriteria: A shared TaskStatus type or enum is defined and exported
Task read/write paths use the shared TaskStatus contract
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement task status update operation
userStories.description: As a user, I want to update a task status from supported values so that I can keep task progress current.
acceptanceCriteria: A backend action or endpoint updates task status by task id
Invalid status values are rejected with a validation error
Updated status is returned to callers
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Show task status badge on task cards
userStories.description: As a user, I want each task card to show a status badge so that I can scan progress quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Task cards render a visible badge for pending, in progress, and done states
Badge text updates when task status changes
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add status control in task list rows
userStories.description: As a user, I want to change status directly in the task list so that I can update progress without leaving the list.
acceptanceCriteria: Each task row includes a status control with pending, in progress, and done options
Changing status triggers the status update operation and refreshes row state
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Filter task list by status
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter tasks by status so that I can focus on pending, in-progress, or completed work.
acceptanceCriteria: Task list includes filter options All, Pending, In Progress, and Done
Selecting a filter updates visible rows to matching statuses
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
